# Custom Agents Directory

This directory is for your custom GitHub Copilot agents.

## During the Lab

You will create custom agents here as part of **Part 3, Exercise 3.1**.

## Agent File Format

Agents should be named: `agent-name.agent.md`

Example structure:
```markdown
---
name: your-agent-name
description: What your agent does
tools:
  - read_file
  - semantic_search
---

Your agent instructions here...
```

## Agents You'll Create

- [ ] steel-expert.agent.md
- [ ] inventory-manager.agent.md
- [ ] quality-inspector.agent.md
- [ ] Additional agents as needed
